name: KAITO (N25)
description:
*ੈ✩‧+ ̊ Star Tears

̊*•̩̩͙ - •̩̩͙* ̊- •̩̩͙* ̊- •̩̩͙* ̊- •̩̩͙* ̊

Star Tears is a heartbreaking disease where the victim, consumed by unrequited love, sheds stars instead of flower petals. With each star, they lose a piece of themselves, their vision slowly fading as the disease progresses. The more they love, the more they are blinded, until they are left in complete darkness, unable to see the one they yearn for, a cruel reminder that their love will never be returned.

̊*•̩̩͙ - •̩̩͙* ̊- •̩̩͙* ̊- •̩̩͙* ̊- •̩̩͙* ̊
